polygon.style: stroke-width: 0.00; stroke: none; stroke-linecap: butt; fill: #7F7F7F; fill-opacity: 0.20;

g.text: Multi-model estimates of cumulative Ebola outbreak size
Each colored point interval shows an individual model’s median (point) with 50%, 80%, and 95%uncertainty intervals. The grey band and line show a smoothed quantile-averaging ensemble
(GAM spline fit to the 2.5th, 50th, and 97.5th percentiles across all models on a log10 scale).
Data: BDBV Modeling Hub model-output submissions, dated 18 May 2026-28 Jun 2026.
